core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Fintech meets Botanical Magazine.
Emotion First: The relief of organized chaos.
Content is King: Receipts are the artifacts; treat them like gallery items.
Zoom In: Focus on the textures of data.
Negative Space: Luxurious padding to reduce financial anxiety.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Serif Headings + Clean Sans Body

gradients.mesh: radial-gradient(at 40% 20%, hsla(28,100%,74%,1) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 80% 0%, hsla(189,100%,56%,1) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 0% 50%, hsla(340,100%,76%,1) 0px, transparent 50%)

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-transparent font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground font-bold px-6 py-3

cards.style: Flat with 1px border. No shadow by default. Shadow-lg on hover.
cards.classes: bg-card border border-border/60 hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300 p-8

inputs.style: Solid background, no border until focus.
inputs.classes: bg-secondary/50 border-0 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 h-12 px-4 rounded-lg

charts.style: Minimalist axes, custom tooltips, organic colors.

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay to the background to simulate paper.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers only. backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border/20.

hero.style: Full width, parallax scroll, overlay with gradient-to-t from-background

login_bg.style: Split screen layout, image on left (desktop) or top (mobile)

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install fonts: Add imports to index.css for Playfair Display and Manrope.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Configure Tailwind: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Global Styles: Add a noise texture overlay div in App.js or index.html that covers the screen with pointer-events-none.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Components: Customize Shadcn components. Remove default sharp corners if they exist, enforce rounded-xl.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Layouts: Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy. Don't use standard columns.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Charts: Use the custom chart_colors array for all Recharts instances.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Chatbot: Design the chat interface to look like a 'Message Thread' on high-end paper. Bubble colors: secondary (bot) vs primary (user).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.design_philosophy: Avoid AI Slop. Make it feel tactile and expensive.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interactive_elements: All buttons must have active scale effects.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: When in doubt, double the padding.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
